signInSubtitle: Sign in to your factory account
quote1: The most dangerous kind of waste is the waste we do not recognize.
quote2: Where there is no standard, there can be no kaizen.
quote3: All we are doing is looking at the timeline and reducing the time.
quote4: Continuous improvement is better than delayed perfection.
quote5: The key to the Toyota Way is not any individual element, but the total system.
quote6: Without standards, there can be no improvement.
quote7: Quality is never an accident; it is always the result of intelligent effort.
quote8: It is not enough to do your best; you must know what to do, and then do your best.
quote9: Improvement usually means doing something that we have never done before.
quote10: Go see, ask why, show respect.
quote11: Make your workplace into a showcase that can be understood by everyone at a glance.
quote12: Having no problems is the biggest problem of all.
quote13: In God we trust, all others bring data.
quote14: The goal is not to add features, it is to eliminate waste.
